title: Stratified Missingness By Cohort And Target
objective: Determine whether missing data patterns differ by site and disease class.
method: Computed feature missingness percentages by source site and binary target, then rendered a cohort-feature heatmap.
results: Highest site-feature missingness is ca in V.A. Medical Center Long Beach at 99.00%.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
Site-specific missingness can let models infer cohort membership and indirectly exploit disease prevalence differences.
